definitions.definition: A <xref>Thai</xref>-style <xref>hot sauce</xref>, typically made from sun-ripened <xref>chili peppers</xref>, <xref>vinegar</xref>, <xref>garlic</xref>, <xref>sugar</xref> and <xref>salt</xref>
